name: Nippon India Mutual Fund - Nippon India ETF Nifty 100
summary: Nippon India Mutual Fund - Nippon India ETF Nifty 100 is an exchange traded fund launched by Reliance Capital Ltd. It is managed by Reliance Capital Asset Management Limited. The fund invests in the public equity markets of India. It seeks to invest in the stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. The fund invests in the stocks of companies across all market capitalizations. It seeks to replicate the performance of the CNX 100 Index, by investing in the stocks of companies as per their weightings in the index. The fund was formerly known as Reliance Mutual Fund - Reliance ETF Nifty 100. Nippon India Mutual Fund - Nippon India ETF Nifty 100 was formed on March 22, 2013 and is domiciled in India.
